chunks.content: Juan David Valencia is an AI Developer at Trajectory Inc. since June 2025, building production AI solutions for enterprise clients. He specializes in NLP, Transformers, LLMs, and full-stack development with React, TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Python.

His professional philosophy is: 'There is no elevator to what is worth it. You climb the stairs, one step at a time.' He believes in fundamentals-first learning and building solid foundations before adopting frameworks.

Juan David's core tech stack includes: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, and Docker. He follows Clean Architecture and Hexagonal Architecture patterns for scalable applications.

In AI/ML, he works with Python, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, HuggingFace Transformers, NLTK, spaCy, LIME, SHAP, and Grad-CAM. He specializes in NLP (sentiment analysis, NER, text classification) and XAI (model interpretability).

Pequelectores is a book recommendation system for children aged 6-14. It uses AI-powered TF-IDF recommendations, reading streaks, badge gamification, and JWT parent authentication. Built with React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, scikit-learn, and Docker. Deployed on Netlify and Railway.

Bootcamp IA — MinTIC is Juan David's AI learning repository with 33 hands-on labs across Basic and Intermediate levels. It covers Machine Learning with scikit-learn, Deep Learning with TensorFlow (CNN at 87.14%, RNN/LSTM, GANs), NLP with Transformers and HuggingFace, XAI with LIME, SHAP, and Grad-CAM, Big Data with Spark and Hadoop, and distributed systems with Kafka. The repo includes 20+ documented labs showing the full ML lifecycle from data preparation to model deployment.

Book-Tracker is a full-stack application for managing personal book collections and tracking reading progress. Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker. Deployed on Netlify and Railway.

Juan David started his career in 2021 as a Technology Media Operator, where he automated inventory management with Python and SQL scripts. He also configured and maintained computer labs for organizations.
In 2022, he completed his SENA internship as a Full-Stack Developer, building Vue.js frontends and PHP/Laravel backends with MySQL databases. He worked in agile teams using Scrum methodology.

In 2025, he completed the MinTIC Artificial Intelligence Bootcamp — 20 intensive weeks covering Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning, XAI, and MLOps. He worked on real projects using TensorFlow, HuggingFace, and modern AI pipelines.

As of June 2025, Juan David works as an AI Developer at Trajectory Inc., developing AI-powered solutions for enterprise clients. He builds production ML pipelines, NLP systems, and scalable APIs, working with LLMs, embeddings, and modern AI infrastructure in a remote team.

Juan David holds a Diploma in Computer Science (2025) from Politecnico Grancolombiano. It covers software architecture (SOA, JEE, .NET), advanced algorithms (graph theory, text search, data structures), and computational complexity.

Juan David studied at Politecnico Grancolombiano and SENA in Colombia. He earned a Diploma in Computer Science (2025) covering software architecture, advanced algorithms, and computational complexity. He also completed the MinTIC AI Bootcamp — 20 weeks of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, XAI, and MLOps.

Juan David holds certifications in: MinTIC Artificial Intelligence Bootcamp (2025), TensorFlow Developer, FastAPI Professional, and React Development. These certifications validate his expertise across AI/ML frameworks and modern web development technologies.

You can contact Juan David through the contact form on this website, or connect with him on LinkedIn. He is based in Palmira, Colombia and is open to AI/ML engineering opportunities, full-stack development projects, and collaborations.

en.response: Hello! I'm Juan David's AI assistant. I can tell you about his skills, projects, experience, and education. What can I help you with?
I'm ready to help! Ask me about Juan David's projects, tech stack, or AI experience.

Juan David works with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, and Docker. In AI/ML he uses TensorFlow, HuggingFace, scikit-learn, NLTK, spaCy, and XAI techniques like LIME, SHAP, and Grad-CAM.

Juan David has 3 main projects: Pequelectores (AI book recommendation for children), Bootcamp IA (33 ML labs with XAI), and Book-Tracker (full-stack library manager). Which one would you like to know more about?

Juan David has 5+ years of experience. He started as a Technology Media Operator automating with Python. In 2022 he interned as a Full-Stack Developer at SENA. In 2025 he completed MinTIC's AI Bootcamp. He now works as an AI Engineer & ML Engineer.

Juan David studied at Politecnico Grancolombiano and SENA. He completed the MinTIC AI Bootcamp in 2025 — 20 weeks covering Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning, XAI, and MLOps. He holds a Diploma in Computer Science and certifications in TensorFlow, FastAPI, and React.
You can contact Juan David through the contact form on this site, or connect on LinkedIn. He's open to AI/ML engineering opportunities, full-stack development, and collaborations.

Juan David's professional philosophy: 'There is no elevator to what's worth it. You climb the stairs, one step at a time.' He believes in fundamentals-first learning and building solid foundations before frameworks.

Pequelectores is a book recommendation system for children aged 6-14. It uses TF-IDF AI recommendations, reading streaks, badge gamification, and JWT parent auth. Built with React, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, scikit-learn, and Docker.

Bootcamp IA — MinTIC is a repository with 33 labs covering ML, Deep Learning (CNN 87.14%, RNN/LSTM, GANs), NLP, XAI (LIME, SHAP, Grad-CAM), Big Data (Spark, Hadoop), and distributed systems (Kafka). It documents the full ML lifecycle.

The NLP section of Bootcamp IA covers sentiment analysis, Named Entity Recognition (NER), text classification, tokenization, and fine-tuning with NLTK, spaCy, and HuggingFace Transformers. Part of 33 total labs.

Juan David holds a Diploma in Computer Science (2025) from Politecnico Grancolombiano covering software architecture (SOA, JEE, .NET), advanced algorithms (graph theory, text search), and computational complexity.

Book-Tracker is a full-stack app for managing personal book collections and tracking reading progress. Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker. Deployed on Netlify and Railway.

es.response: ¡Hola! Soy el asistente virtual de Juan David. Puedo hablarte sobre sus habilidades, proyectos, experiencia y formación. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte?
¡Estoy listo para ayudarte! Pregúntame sobre los proyectos de Juan David, su stack tecnológico o su experiencia en IA.

Juan David maneja React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL y Docker. En IA/ML trabaja con TensorFlow, HuggingFace, scikit-learn, NLTK, spaCy, y técnicas de XAI como LIME, SHAP y Grad-CAM.

Juan David tiene 3 proyectos principales: Pequelectores (recomendador de libros con IA para niños), Bootcamp IA (33 laboratorios de ML con XAI), y Book-Tracker (gestión de bibliotecas full-stack). ¿Cuál te interesa más?

Juan David tiene más de 5 años de experiencia. Empezó como Operador de Medios Tecnológicos automatizando con Python. En 2022 hizo prácticas en SENA como Full-Stack Developer. En 2025 completó el Bootcamp IA de MinTIC. Actualmente trabaja como AI Engineer & ML Engineer.

Juan David estudió en el Politécnico Grancolombiano y el SENA. Completó el Bootcamp de IA de MinTIC en 2025 — 20 semanas de Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning, XAI y MLOps. Tiene un Diplomado en Ciencias de la Computación y certificaciones en TensorFlow, FastAPI y React.
Puedes contactar a Juan David a través del formulario en este sitio, o en LinkedIn. Está abierto a oportunidades de AI/ML, desarrollo full-stack y colaboraciones.

La filosofía de Juan David: 'No hay ascensor hacia lo que vale la pena. Se sube por las escaleras, un escalón a la vez.' Cree en aprender fundamentos primero y construir bases sólidas antes de adoptar frameworks.

Pequelectores es un sistema de recomendación de libros para niños de 6-14 años. Usa recomendaciones con TF-IDF, rachas de lectura, gamificación con insignias y autenticación JWT para padres. Construido con React, FastAPI, Python, PostgreSQL, scikit-learn y Docker.

Bootcamp IA — MinTIC es un repositorio con 33 laboratorios que cubren ML, Deep Learning (CNN 87.14%, RNN/LSTM, GANs), NLP, XAI (LIME, SHAP, Grad-CAM), Big Data (Spark, Hadoop) y sistemas distribuidos (Kafka). Documenta el ciclo completo de ML.

La sección de NLP del Bootcamp IA cubre análisis de sentimiento, Named Entity Recognition (NER), clasificación de texto, tokenización y fine-tuning con NLTK, spaCy y HuggingFace Transformers. Parte de 33 laboratorios.

Juan David tiene un Diplomado en Ciencias de la Computación (2025) del Politécnico Grancolombiano que cubre arquitectura de software (SOA, JEE, .NET), algoritmia avanzada (teoría de grafos, búsqueda en texto) y complejidad computacional.

Book-Tracker es una app full-stack para gestionar colecciones de libros y seguir el progreso de lectura. Construida con React, TypeScript, Tailwind, FastAPI, PostgreSQL y Docker. Desplegada en Netlify y Railway.
